infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: NoteFlex needs photo access to add images to notes.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: NoteFlex needs camera access to take photos for notes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: NoteFlex needs microphone access to record audio notes.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow NoteFlex to access your microphone for audio notes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NoteFlex to access your photos for image notes.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NoteFlex to use your camera for image notes.
